hero.title: Designing spaces that inspire
hero.subtitle: Quietly luxurious homes, precise commercial spaces, and interiors shaped by proportion, light, and material clarity.

about.label: About
about.title: Architecture shaped by light, proportion, and calm.
about.bio: Aureline Studio creates contemporary architecture with a composed, editorial sensibility. Every project begins with the site, the client, and the way a space should feel from the first step inside.
about.philosophy: The studio works across residential, commercial, and interior commissions with an emphasis on spatial rhythm, natural materials, and restrained detailing.
principles: A calm atmosphere that still feels alive

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.title: Selected projects
portfolio.intro: A focused body of work across private residences, workplaces, and interiors. Each project balances performance with atmosphere.

projects.title: Lakeside House
projects.description: A restrained family retreat where large openings, oak surfaces, and soft stone connect the home to the landscape.

projects.title: Atelier 18
projects.description: A compact city residence composed as a sequence of still, light-filled rooms with concealed storage and sculpted circulation.

projects.title: North Quay Office
projects.description: A client-facing workspace with warm timber, acoustic clarity, and a material palette tuned for focus and hospitality.

projects.title: Courtyard Residence
projects.description: A three-level home organized around a sheltered inner garden, with a sequence of framed views and quiet transitions.

projectPage.detail: The project balances pragmatic planning with a quiet material language, allowing the architecture to feel composed, tactile, and enduring.

services.label: Services
services.title: Built around the full journey from concept to completion.

items.title: Residential Architecture
items.description: Homes, villas, and retreats shaped around the way people actually live.

items.title: Commercial Design
items.description: Client suites, office environments, and hospitality spaces with a premium presence.

items.title: Interior Design
items.description: Material, lighting, and joinery strategies that bring cohesion to each interior.

items.title: Urban Planning
items.description: Early-stage spatial studies and planning concepts for larger developments.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Clients return for the process as much as the result.

items.quote: The studio understood the brief with remarkable precision. The final home feels calm, elegant, and completely ours.
items.name: Elena Morozova

items.quote: Every decision was considered. The office now supports focus, hospitality, and the brand in a single quiet language.
items.name: Daniel Reeves

items.quote: The process was structured, collaborative, and exceptionally clear. The project moved with confidence from start to finish.
items.name: Iryna Volkov

footer.line: Aureline Studio designs modern architecture with clarity, restraint, and lasting value.
